parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phase: $json.phase, technique_ids: $('Ingest Alert').first().json.case.mitre_techniques, query: `${$('Ingest Alert').first().json.case.threat_name} ${$json.phase} incident response procedure ${$('Ingest Alert').first().json.case.mitre_techniques.join(' ')}`, top_k: 5 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, maxOutputTokens: 4096 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ case_id: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.case_id, threat_name: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.threat_name, technique_ids: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.technique_ids, severity: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.severity, status: 'draft', markdown: $json.markdown, missing_techniques: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.missing_techniques, ncsc_category: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.ncsc.ncsc_category, escalation_tier: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.ncsc.escalation_tier }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ account_privilege: $('Ingest Alert').first().json.case.account_privilege, attack_success: $('Ingest Alert').first().json.case.attack_success, distinct_accounts: $('Ingest Alert').first().json.case.distinct_accounts, cti_verdict: $json.cti_verdict }) }}
